title: Logistics Career Compass
description:
Logistics Career Compass is Tirwin Talent’s flagship training initiative designed to guide fresh talent into the vast world of logistics, freight forwarding, and global trade. Built by industry veterans, this program combines technical mastery, real-world simulations, and career mentorship to empower learners to become job-ready professionals.

“Navigate. Learn. Deliver.” – Logistics Career Compass
objective: To equip newcomers with practical skills, industry knowledge, and job readiness for careers in logistics, freight forwarding, and export-import operations.
targetAudience: Graduates and diploma holders seeking careers in supply chain, cargo, and EXIM operations
Career switchers entering the logistics domain for the first time
Colleges and institutes looking to offer industry-integrated curriculum
Rural talent ready for skill-based placement opportunities

features.title: Delivery
features.description: Online for 6 - 8 weeks (flexible for weekend or evening batches)

features.title: Industry Mentorship
features.description: Pre-recorded / Virtual live interactions with logistics leaders

features.title: Career Prep
features.description: Resume building, mock interviews, placement support

features.title: Certification
features.description: Recognized credential co-branded by Tirwin Talent

outcomes: Confidently handle real-world logistics and EXIM operations
Build a strong foundation for roles at NVOCCs, freight forwarders, and customs firms
Be interview-ready with mentorship and career support from industry experts

blocks.title: Block 1: Foundations of Logistics & Trade
blocks.subtitle: Laying the groundwork for career clarity and operational understanding
modules: Port of Entry – Introduction to Logistics & EXIM Careers
Supply Chain Foundations – Key concepts in transportation, warehousing, and inventory
EXIM Ecosystem – Overview of global trade and import-export operations
Documentation Deep Dive – Bills, invoices, packing lists, LC, and SOPs

blocks.title: Block 2: Trade Compliance & Freight Operations
blocks.subtitle: Giving learners the toolkit for precision, compliance, and freight handling
modules: Incoterms & Shipping Terms – Understanding trade definitions and responsibilities
Customs Compliance – Customs basics, DGFT processes, GST rules, EOU/STPI protocols
NVOCC & Freight Forwarding Operations – Booking, container handling, consolidation
Tech Tools – Knowledge of digitized logistics platforms, Intro to AI in Logistics

blocks.title: Block 3: Applied Skills & Simulation
blocks.subtitle: Translating knowledge into real-world cargo handling and logistics tech use
modules: Software Tools: WMS/TMS/ERP – Functionality of these applications
Cargo Documentation Simulations – Role-play, mock bookings, SOP creation
Dangerous Goods, Regulatory Risk & Audit – DG goods handling, Trade audits, risk flags, mitigation strategies
Rural & Remote Logistics Planning – Designing accessible supply chain models

blocks.title: Block 4: Career Empowerment & Placement Readiness
blocks.subtitle: Equipping learners with the mindset, soft skills, and mentor guidance to succeed
modules: Soft Skills for Logistics Professionals – Communication, email etiquette, teamwork
Negotiation & Conflict Resolution – Tactics in customs, vendor, and client contexts
Career Toolkit – Resume building, interview prep, LinkedIn visibility
Industry Mentorship & Placement Readiness – Career guidance, certification, job access

pricingOptions.title: Standard Track
pricingOptions.description: Full access to 16 modules, certification, mentor guidance

pricingOptions.title: Premium Track
pricingOptions.description: All Standard features + 1:1 career coaching, placement services

title: Corporate workshop on International Freight Forwarding
description: The goal of this training is to build a strong conceptual and functional understanding of international logistics for non-operational staff.

title: Advanced Supply Chain Management & Optimization
description: This course provides an in-depth understanding of supply chain design, risk management, and optimization techniques using AI and automation.
